title: Ocotea triangulata
taxonomy: Ocotea triangulata is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Ocotea triangulata places it within the genus Ocotea, which is a group of flowering plants commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The Lauraceae family to which Ocotea triangulata belongs is an ancient and diverse group of plants, many of which are valued for their aromatic wood and medicinal properties. The classification of Ocotea triangulata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Lauraceae family.
